title: The Chambermaid's Second Song
content:
From pleasure of the bed,
Dull as a worm,
His rod and its butting head
Limp as a worm,
His spirit that has fled
Blind as a worm.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "The Chambermaid's Second Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
